translations.menu.license.tooltip: View the license file beside the application
translations.menu.settings.tooltip: Open appearance, language, and startup settings
translations.settings.language.hint: Languages are loaded from the languages folder beside the application. Changes apply immediately, and missing text follows the pack's fallback setting.
translations.settings.language.label: Language
translations.settings.language.tooltip: Select the interface language; it changes immediately after saving
translations.settings.theme.hint: Follow the system theme or force light or dark mode.
translations.settings.theme.system.tooltip: Follow the Windows light or dark theme
translations.settings.background.path_hint: Default: Style/ksword_background.png. PNG, JPG, and BMP images are supported.
translations.settings.background.opacity: Background opacity (0% solid color, 100% image only)
translations.settings.interaction.hint: Configure scrollbar width and visibility, and whether the mouse wheel changes slider values.
translations.settings.scrollbar.auto_hide.tooltip: Keep scrollbars narrow until the pointer hovers over them
translations.settings.slider.wheel: Allow the mouse wheel to adjust sliders
translations.settings.slider.wheel.tooltip: When disabled, the mouse wheel scrolls the page instead of changing a hovered slider
translations.settings.startup.hint: Configure the window state and privilege requests used at the next launch.
translations.settings.startup.maximized.tooltip: Open the main window maximized at the next launch
translations.settings.startup.topmost: Keep the window on top after launch
translations.settings.startup.topmost.tooltip: Enable topmost mode on launch; UIAccess mode uses the highest available level
translations.settings.startup.admin.tooltip: Try to relaunch as administrator before showing the startup screen
translations.settings.startup.unlocker: Add File Unlocker to the Windows context menu
translations.settings.startup.unlocker.tooltip: Apply immediately to add or remove the KSword File Unlocker (R3/R0) context-menu item
translations.settings.startup.taskmgr_hint: Task Manager redirection uses TaskmgrHijack.ps1 beside the application and requests elevation when needed.
translations.settings.startup.taskmgr_install.tooltip: Run TaskmgrHijack.ps1 -Install and redirect Task Manager to KSword
translations.settings.startup.taskmgr_uninstall.toolt: Run TaskmgrHijack.ps1 -Uninstall and remove the taskmgr.exe redirection
translations.settings.startup.scale.tooltip: Main-window scale applied after restart: 1.00 = 100%, supported range 0.50 to 2.00
translations.settings.startup.scale_hint: Current: about %1% (applies after restart in addition to system scaling)
translations.settings.apply.pending: Apply pending settings (language, theme, background, and context-menu changes are immediate)
translations.settings.online.hint: Online scanning reads API keys from these settings. The current Upload to Sandbox action uses VirusTotal; ThreatBook is reserved for later use.
translations.settings.online.virustotal.tooltip: Used as the x-apikey header for the VirusTotal v3 API; leave blank to disable uploads
translations.settings.online.threatbook.tooltip: Used as the apikey parameter for the ThreatBook v3 API; leave blank to disable uploads
translations.settings.online.storage_hint: API keys are stored in the same JSON file as appearance settings. Clear and save a field to remove a stored key.
translations.settings.online.save.tooltip: Save VirusTotal and ThreatBook API keys to the settings JSON file
translations.settings.online.save.pending: Save API keys and other pending settings
